history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. Moving straight ahead would take me into safe floor cells at row 02 C and D, while the lava at row 02 E blocks further progress, so I should advance one step first.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column D is safe floor, and moving forward keeps me progressing toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 02 column E.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column E is lava, so I cannot continue forward. The safest way to proceed toward the goal is to turn downward and go around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is safe floor, so moving forward is the best next step to continue around the lava and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column D is safe floor, so I should keep moving forward toward the lower corridor that leads around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column D is lava, so I must not move forward. To bypass the lava barrier, I should turn right to face the safe open path toward column E.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column D facing left. The cell ahead at row 04 column C is safe floor, and moving left keeps me on the upper open route toward the goal. So I should advance forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 04 column B facing left. The cell ahead at row 04 column A is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To continue toward the goal, I need to turn around and head right along the open row.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving forward keeps me in the clear upper corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe floor, and moving forward continues upward without stepping on lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column B facing up, and the cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot go forward. To continue toward the goal at row 08 column H, I should turn right to head east through the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column D is safe floor, and moving forward advances me along the upper corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column E is lava, so I must not move forward. The safe path continues downward through the open area, so I should turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is safe, and moving forward brings me into the open area toward the route that can lead around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column D is safe, so I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column D is lava, so I must not move forward. To avoid it and head toward the goal on the right, I should turn left to face east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column D facing right. The path to the goal is blocked if I go straight because row 05 has lava columns B through G, but column H is open and connects downward toward the goal at H08. I should move forward to continue toward the right side.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column E facing right. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column F, which is safe and keeps me on the route toward the open column H and the goal below it. I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column F facing right. The cell ahead, row 04 column G, is safe and keeps me moving toward the open column H that leads down to the goal. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column G facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, and the path continues safely to the right into column H. Moving forward to row 04 column H is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column H facing right. The cell ahead would be row 04 column I, but that is a wall, so I cannot continue forward. The safe route to the goal is to go downward along column H, which requires turning clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column H facing down. The cell ahead is row 05 column H, which is safe floor. Moving forward takes me closer to the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>

FRENTE
